about.title: About us
about.lead: Welcome to Delice Douja, the excellence of pastry in Fez and across Morocco.
about.storyBody: Founded in 2019, Delice Douja was born from a deep passion for the art of pastry and a clear goal: to offer a unique, refined, and unforgettable taste experience. Since our creation, we have established ourselves as one of the best pastry choices in Fez and Morocco thanks to a perfect balance between tradition and modernity.
about.missionBody: At Delice Douja, our mission is simple: to turn every moment into a delicious memory. We do not only make cakes. We create emotions, smiles, and memories.
about.missionHighlight: Turn every moment into a delicious memory.
about.knowHowIntro: Our creations are the result of precise artisan work based on:
about.knowHow4: Expertise inspired by Moroccan and international pastry
about.knowHowHighlight: Every detail matters, because for us perfection is not an option, it is a rule.
about.chefBody1: At the heart of our success is Khadija Jebbar, our experienced pastry chef.
about.chefBody2: With specialized pastry diplomas and several professional training programs, she embodies excellence, rigor, and creativity. Thanks to her expertise and passion, every Delice Douja creation becomes a true work of art, combining taste, beauty, and perfection.
about.whyHighlight: Our priority is clear: to offer you the very best, with no compromise.
about.visionBody: We aspire to become a national reference and to proudly carry the name of Delice Douja as a symbol of quality and excellence throughout Morocco.
about.signature: Because for us, pastry is not just a product: it is a signature.
about.commitmentIntro: At Delice Douja, we believe that every customer deserves:
about.finalTitle: Delice Douja – More than a pastry house
